title: betula lenta var. humilis
intro: Betula lenta var. humilis, also known as dwarf or shrubby birch, is a variety of the American birch tree, characterized by its compact growth habit and smaller leaves. The medicinal properties of Betula lenta var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, due to the presence of salicylic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of using Betula lenta var. humilis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. Betula lenta var. humilis can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
